brand.font_fallback: Any thick bold font, written in capitals
brand.font_notes: Prater Sans Pro requires Adobe activation. Karla Bold is available free on Google Fonts. Use Karla for web/dashboard contexts unless Adobe Fonts embed is active.

full_orange_on_black.description: Full horizontal lockup — orange on black background

full_white_on_black.description: Full horizontal lockup — white on black background
full_white_on_black.use_on: Dark/black backgrounds where orange feels too heavy

full_white_on_red.description: Full horizontal lockup — white on primary orange/red background

icon_white_on_black.use_on: Favicon, app icon, small contexts on dark backgrounds

icon_orange_on_white.use_on: Light backgrounds where brand colour should show

brand.logo_usage: Always keep name and logo mark prominent. Use full lockup where space allows. Drop to icon-only for favicon and small contexts. Match logo colour variant to background for maximum contrast.
brand.tone_of_voice: warm, personal, community-driven, unpretentious, passionate about food
brand.brand_personality: Founder-led Bristol sourdough pizzeria. Started in a back garden, grown through community and word of mouth. Handcrafted, real, Bristol-rooted.

business.description: Bristol-based sourdough pizzeria with a Sicilian twist, founded by Danny during lockdown. Started as a back garden delivery service, now a city centre restaurant and mobile catering arm.
business.usp: Authentic Neapolitan sourdough pizza made entirely in-house with quality seasonal ingredients. A decade of experience and a genuine founder story.

sub_brands.name: The Big Arancini
sub_brands.description: Mobile catering for festivals, markets and private events

business.target_audience: Bristol locals, food lovers, festival-goers, event planners looking for catering

notes: Copy all SVG logo files to /public/clients/back-garden-pizzeria/. Fill in GA4 property ID and GTM container ID once analytics are live. Confirm Instagram handle with Danny.
